name: Mrs. Wades' Coconut Bon-Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix confectioner's sugar and butter in a large bowl until combined.
2. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk and mix until smooth.
3. Stir in flaked coconut until evenly distributed.
4. Fold in chopped pecans until mixed.
5. Form the mixture into small balls (about 1 inch).
6. Refrigerate the balls for at least 30 minutes to allow them to set.
7. In a double boiler, melt chocolate and wax paraffin together.
8. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
9. Dip each ball into the melted chocolate mixture, allowing excess to drip off.
10. Place the dipped balls on wax paper to set.
11. Allow the bon-bons to cool completely before storing at room temperature or in the refrigerator.
